news.title: AutoZone (AZO) Faces New Questions As O'Reilly Eyes Genuine Parts Deal
news.summary: O'Reilly Automotive is rumored to be preparing a takeover bid for Genuine Parts Company. The potential deal would create a larger rival in auto parts retail, raising competitive concerns for AutoZone (NYSE:AZO).
